title: Chionanthus remotinervius
taxonomy: Chionanthus remotinervius is a species of plant in the family Oleaceae. It belongs to the genus Chionanthus, which consists of flowering plants commonly known as fringetrees. Chionanthus remotinervius is native to China and is a deciduous shrub or small tree. The classification of Chionanthus remotinervius places it within the order Lamiales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and relationships to other plants in its family and genus.
